  rw [← h_max.encard, ← h_sum, ENat.add_sub_cancel_right (by sorry)]

let H := G - X
  have h_iness : ∀ x, H.inessential x := sorry
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hM_prop⟩ := foo_of_forall_inessential h_iness
  have h_max : H.IsMaxMatching M := sorry
  have h_count : 2 * M.encard = (V(G) \ X).encard - H.OddComponents.encard := sorry
  rw [← h_max.encard, h_count]

let H := G - X
  have h_iness : ∀ v, H.inessential v := by
    intro v
    refine (em (v ∈ V(H))).elim (fun hv ↦ ?_) (inessential_of_not_mem)
    have hν : ν(H - v) = ν(H) := by
      refine (MatchingNumber_mono (H.delete_subset v)).antisymm (by_contra fun hlt ↦ ?_)
      have h_prop : ν(G - (X ∪ {v})) = ν(G) - (X ∪ {v}).encard := by
        rw [delete_union_singleton, hX.1, encard_union_singleton hv]
        exact ENat.sub_sub_self (hX.1.symm ▸ MatchingNumber_mono (delete_subset_ground G X)) (not_le.1 hlt)
      exact (hX.2 h_prop (subset_union_left X {v})).not_lt (ssubset_union_left.mpr hv)
    obtain ⟨M, hM_max, hM_v⟩ := sorry
    exact ⟨M, hM_max, hM_v⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM_match, hM_comp⟩ := foo_of_forall_inessential h_iness
  have h_max : H.IsMaxMatching M := sorry
  have h_enc : 2 * M.encard = (G.vertexSet \ X).encard - H.OddComponents.encard := sorry
  rw [h_max.encard, h_enc]

have h_iness : ∀ x, (G - X).inessential x := by
    intro x; obtain hx | hx := em (x ∈ V(G - X))
    · have h_ss : X ⊂ insert x X := ssubset_insert (mem_not_mem_diff hx).2
      have h_max := mt (hX.2 (insert x X)) (by simp [h_ss.ne, h_ss.subset])
      rw [vertexDelete_vertexDelete, ← insert_eq, encard_insert_of_not_mem (mem_not_mem_diff hx).2, hX.1] at h_max
      sorry
    · exact inessential_of_not_mem hx
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hM_comp⟩ := foo_of_forall_inessential h_iness
  have hM_max : (G - X).IsMaxMatching M := sorry
  have h_encard : (V(G) \ X).encard = 2 * M.encard + (G - X).OddComponents.encard := sorry
  rw [hM_max.encard, h_encard, add_tsub_cancel_right]

let H := G - X
  have hH : ∀ x, H.inessential x := fun x ↦ (em (x ∈ V(H))).elim (fun hx ↦ by
    have h_eq : ν(H - x) = ν(H) := (matchingNumber_delete_vertex_le H x).antisymm 
      (not_lt.1 fun h ↦ hX.2 (X ∪ {x}) (by rw [encard_insert (mem_diff_iff.mp hx).2, ← hX.1]; rfl)
      (ssubset_insert (mem_diff_iff.mp hx).2).left |>.nodup)
    obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := exists_isMaxMatching_of_MatchingNumber (H - x) h_eq
    exact ⟨M, hM.of_delete_vertex, hM.not_mem_V_delete_vertex⟩) (inessential_of_not_mem ·)
  obtain ⟨M, hM, h_comp⟩ := foo_of_forall_inessential hH
  have hM_max : H.IsMaxMatching M := ⟨hM, fun M' hM' ↦ sorry⟩
  have h_enc : (V(G) \ X).encard = 2 * M.encard + (G - X).OddComponents.encard := sorry
  rw [hM_max.encard, h_enc, add_tsub_cancel_right]
